title: Start Game
description: Configure initial world state. Note: These settings cannot be changed once the game starts.

tips.sect_num: Sect number should be less than half of initial cultivators.

placeholders.world_lore: Describe the cultivation system, moral alignment, sect ecosystem, and regional flavor first, then add major historical eras and events. Enabling this uses the LLM and noticeably increases initialization time. (Optional)
